prompt:
Reference image role: the project list prototype defines the visual DNA — moonlit tree-hollow workshop with a glowing portal-like round window, ancient runes/seals etched on bark, warm lanterns, restrained Eastern xianxia mood with a slight forge/工坊 feeling. PRESERVE this DNA. Layout (right tree-cave with round runic portal + left dark area) must mirror prototype.

Create a wide hero background for the project list page header of "夕丰木". 16:9 wide format.

Composition:
- Right 55%: A workshop nook inside an ancient tree hollow. A large circular runic portal-window made of carved wood with faint golden glyphs and inner blue-cyan glow #6A9580 over distant misty mountains. Stone stairs descending toward the portal. Several warm-glowing lanterns hanging on both sides. Wooden hanging tools/scrolls on the right wall. Drifting firefly cyan motes.
- Left 45%: Dark, atmospheric, intentionally quiet — reserved for "项目集 / PROJECTS" title, description, and a small round compass/年轮罗盘 ornament to be overlaid by HTML. Faint root tendrils. NO text, NO UI in this image.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, moss #33513A, lantern #ddb87a, portal glow #6A9580, firefly #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: people, text, browser frames, navigation, characters, oversaturated, neon, purple, red, MMORPG, cartoonish.
